name: Cisco Meraki - WAN Circuit Details
description: Retrieves WAN uplink status (WAN1, WAN2, cellular) for Meraki MX/Z appliances in an organization, enriched with device alias, tags, and per-interface description. The macAddresses parameter accepts a comma-separated list of device management MAC addresses (as shown in the Meraki Dashboard under Devices) to filter results to specific appliances — it does not refer to a WAN interface MAC. If left empty, all MX/Z appliances in the organization are returned.
